---
name: Report Broken Integration
about: Signal that a template or integration is no longer working.
title: "[BROKEN]: <Integration Name>"
labels: ["broken", "needs-investigation"]
---

**Which integration is broken?**
(e.g., AWS CloudWatch Template)

**Describe the issue**
What error are you seeing? (e.g., Zabbix Item transformed to 'Not Supported')

**Zabbix Version**
(e.g., 6.0, 7.0)

**Screenshots/Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or paste log snippets here.
